metadata.siteTitle: Riwaq — Professional Restaurant & Café Equipment in Tunisia

home.sellerCtaSubtitle: Publish for free or boost your listing to sell faster
home.whySubtitle: The first Tunisian platform dedicated to professional restaurant and café equipment — new and used. No more Facebook group chaos. Clear listings, detailed specs, and filters to find exactly what you need.
home.propSpecializedDesc: Only professional equipment — café, kitchen, cold storage, pastry, furniture. No noise.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to find or sell your professional equipment.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Explore listings by category, city or keyword. Find exactly what you need.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Call or send a WhatsApp message directly to the seller. No middleman, no delay.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Meet in person, inspect the equipment and finalize the transaction independently.

pricing.metaDescription: Choose the plan that fits your needs. Publish for free or level up with Riwaq.
pricing.heroSubtitle: From free to professional, find the offer suited to your business. Start without an account or level up.
pricing.readyToSellSubtitle: Start for free now. No credit card required.

free.name: Discovery
free.description: Try Riwaq in 2 minutes. Post a listing without signing up to see how it works — ideal for a quick first try.

account.name: Essential
account.description: Create an account in 30 seconds and stay in control. Edit your listings, track them from your dashboard, and sell at your pace.

premium.name: Pro
premium.description: For those who sell regularly. Extra tools are on the way to help you sell faster and more effectively.

store.name: Store
store.description: A dedicated space for professionals who want to stand out. Something new is coming for the most active sellers.

faqs.q1: Can I publish without creating an account?
faqs.a1: Yes! The Discovery plan lets you post a listing without any registration. The listing will be visible for 4 days — perfect for testing the platform.
faqs.q2: What's the difference between Discovery and Essential?
faqs.a2: With Discovery, you post a listing quickly but it's not editable and expires after 4 days. With Essential (also free), you create an account in 30 seconds and can edit, manage and post up to 5 listings for 30 days each, with real-time view counts.
faqs.q3: How does the Pro plan work?
faqs.a3: The Pro plan is being prepared. It will offer additional tools for regular sellers — more details will be announced soon.
faqs.a4: The Store plan is under development. It will offer a dedicated space for professional sellers with advanced features. Stay tuned for details.
faqs.q5: My Discovery listing expired, what should I do?
faqs.a5: Don't panic! You can republish your listing in one click from your management link. Even better: create a free Essential account to get 30 days of visibility and easily manage your listings.
faqs.a6: No. The Discovery and Essential plans are 100% free, with no commission and no commitment. Paid plans will be clearly displayed.

about.metaDescription: Discover Riwaq, the Tunisian platform dedicated to professional restaurant and café equipment.
about.title: About Riwaq
about.intro1: Riwaq — the word means a covered passage, a corridor where people cross paths, stop, and exchange. That's exactly what we wanted to create: a simple, calm space where food service professionals in Tunisia can find and sell equipment.
about.intro2: If you own a café, restaurant, fast food shop, or bakery, you know how hard it is to find used professional equipment. Facebook groups are chaotic, general platforms are noisy, and Google doesn't always help.
about.intro3: Riwaq solves this problem by offering a dedicated platform where every listing is about professional restaurant and café equipment. No noise, no distraction — just what you're looking for.
about.philo1Desc: No account required, no complex verification. Post your listing in minutes.
about.philo2Desc: Call or send a WhatsApp message directly to the seller. No middleman.
about.philo3Desc: Riwaq is free for users. No commission, no hidden fees.
about.philo4Desc: Designed for Tunisian professionals, with local cities and habits in mind.
about.missingSpace: Riwaq is not a general marketplace. It's a dedicated space, designed for a specific community. Like a riwaq in the medina: a place where you pass through, look around, and find what you need.
about.quote: "A place that was missing, but now exists."

contact.metaDescription: Contact the Riwaq team for any question or suggestion.
contact.title: Contact
contact.intro: Have a question, suggestion, or want to report a problem? Don't hesitate to contact us.
contact.note: Note: Riwaq is a listings platform and does not manage transactions between users. For any transaction-related issue, please contact the seller or buyer directly.

terms.metaDescription: Terms of use and legal notices for Riwaq.
terms.title: Terms of use
terms.section1Content: Riwaq is an online listings platform dedicated to professional restaurant and café equipment in Tunisia. The service allows users to publish and view listings for free.
terms.section2Content: Riwaq acts solely as a connection platform. Riwaq does not participate in transactions between buyers and sellers, and cannot be held responsible for the quality of goods, prices, or user behavior.
terms.section2Highlight: Transactions are the sole responsibility of users.
section3Items: Listings must concern professional restaurant or café equipment.
Published information must be accurate and honest.
Illegal, offensive, or fraudulent content is prohibited.
Riwaq reserves the right to remove any listing without notice.
terms.section4Content: The only information collected is what you provide in your listing (phone number, optional name). This information is publicly visible on your listing. Riwaq does not sell or share your data with third parties.
terms.section5Content: Riwaq offers no warranty on listed products. Users are responsible for verifying the quality and authenticity of goods before purchase. Riwaq recommends always inspecting equipment in person before completing a transaction.
terms.section6Content: Riwaq reserves the right to modify these terms at any time. Changes take effect upon publication on this page.
